metadata.title: Ministerial Order BA 2024 04 - Zero Carbon Step Code
metadata.description: Revision 4 amends Zero Carbon Step Code to require new buildings to meet at least EL-1 (Energy Level 1)
metadata.authority: BC Ministry of Housing - Building and Safety Standards Branch
metadata.author: BC Building and Safety Standards Branch

amendment.description: Repeal and substitute Sentence 9.37.1.3.(1) requiring buildings to conform to GHG Emission Levels EL-1, EL-2, EL-3 or EL-4

content.text: Buildings shall conform to the requirements of any of GHG Emission Levels EL-1, EL-2, EL-3 or EL-4 and shall be designed and constructed to conform to one of the GHG emission compliance options in Table 9.37.1.3.

revision.change-summary: Repealed and substituted Sentence 9.37.1.3.(1) to require buildings to conform to GHG Emission Levels EL-1, EL-2, EL-3 or EL-4 with reference to Table 9.37.1.3

amendment.description: Repeal and substitute Sentence 10.3.1.3.(1) requiring buildings to conform to GHG Emission Levels EL-1, EL-2, EL-3 or EL-4 based on occupancy

content.text: Buildings shall conform to the requirements of any of GHG Emission Levels EL-1, EL-2, EL-3 or EL-4 and shall be designed and constructed to conform to Table 10.3.1.3. based on occupancy.

revision.change-summary: Repealed and substituted Sentence 10.3.1.3.(1) to require buildings to conform to GHG Emission Levels EL-1, EL-2, EL-3 or EL-4 with reference to Table 10.3.1.3 based on occupancy
